name: awesome-journal-skills
description: Per-journal fit-and-house-style agent skills across economics, business, social science, humanities, natural science, clinical medicine, engineering, and CS conferences — per-journal depth packs plus discipline breadth bundles. Add this marketplace once, then `/plugin install <pack-name>` for any venue.

plugins.name: aaai-skills
plugins.description: Twelve AAAI-specific skills for AI conference submission strategy, grounded in official AAAI-26 submission instructions, review process, author policies, rebuttal FAQ, supplementary-material rules, and AI-assisted review FAQ.

plugins.name: academy-of-management-annals-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Academy of Management Annals manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: amj-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Academy of Management Journal (AMJ) manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: amr-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill theory-development bundle for the Academy of Management Review (AMR), AOM's conceptual/theory journal. Theory-puzzle framing, construct clarity, propositions (not hypotheses tested), argument-logic stress-testing, contribution differentiation, conceptual figures, APA/AOM style, ScholarOne double-anonymous developmental review. NO empirical data — that is AMJ's lane.

plugins.name: accounting-research-skills
plugins.description: Thirteen-skill bundle covering the 《会计研究》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, accounting-vs-finance fit positioning, topic selection, literature review, institutional/standards background, accounting measurement, quasi-experimental identification, information mechanism, robustness, tables/figures, standard-setter/regulator implications, submission preflight, and rebuttal.

plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Administrative Science Quarterly (ASQ) manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the MIS Quarterly (MISQ) manuscript lifecycle across the four IS research traditions.

plugins.name: nankai-business-review-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the 《南开管理评论》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, fit positioning, theory-gap articulation, mechanism-backed hypothesis development, measurement rigor (reliability / validity / common-method-bias), survey-SEM (mediation / moderation / moderated mediation / HLM), experiments, multi-case / grounded theory, China contextualization, discussion that advances a management theory, submission preflight, and rebuttal.

plugins.name: nejm-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the NEJM clinical manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, clinical-significance fit, study design & trial registration, EQUATOR reporting guidelines, structured abstract, terse IMRAD writing, clinical statistics, clinical display items, clinical ethics & integrity, Vancouver/ICMJE references, submission preflight, and response to reviewers.

plugins.name: neurips-skills
plugins.description: Twelve NeurIPS-specific skills for AI/ML conference submission strategy, grounded in official NeurIPS 2026 CFP, Main Track Handbook, checklist, OpenReview response mechanics, code/data guidance, and camera-ready rules.

plugins.name: new-media-and-society-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the New Media & Society (NM&S) manuscript lifecycle across qualitative, critical, content/discourse, computational, and mixed methods.

plugins.name: ors-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Operations Research (OR) manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: orgsci-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Organization Science manuscript lifecycle, from contribution statement to rebuttal.

plugins.name: organization-studies-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Organization Studies manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: perspectives-on-psychological-science-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Perspectives on Psychological Science manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: prl-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Physical Review Letters (PRL) manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: pmla-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the PMLA (Publications of the Modern Language Association) manuscript lifecycle for literary and language studies — argument, close reading, theory, and MLA style.

plugins.name: pnas-nexus-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle for PNAS Nexus — the fully open-access, multidisciplinary sibling of PNAS (Oxford University Press, on behalf of the NAS): workflow router, scope/significance fit with the PNAS-to-Nexus transfer route, gold open access + APC + CC BY/CC BY-NC license selection (in place of flagship PNAS's Direct/Contributed track), the 50-120-word Significance Statement, <=250-word abstract, article-type + page-based writing with in-text Materials and Methods, display items, statistics & reproducibility incl. Registered Reports, mandatory data/code availability, references format-neutral at submission, submission preflight, and reviewer rebuttal.

plugins.name: pnas-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the PNAS manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, scope/significance fit, submission-track selection (Direct vs Contributed), the ≤120-word Significance Statement, ≤250-word abstract, main-text writing with in-text Materials and Methods + classification, display items, statistics & reproducibility, data/code availability, numbered reference style, submission preflight, and reviewer rebuttal.

plugins.name: population-and-development-review-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Population and Development Review (PDR) manuscript lifecycle across the demography-and-development intersection, with demographic methods (life tables, decomposition, event history, age-period-cohort, projections), synthetic-essay craft, double-anonymized review, Free Format ScholarOne submission, and no author fees under the standard model.

plugins.name: pom-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Production and Operations Management (POM) manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: progress-in-human-geography-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Progress in Human Geography (PiHG) review-article lifecycle, from topic selection and the commissioning/submission intake routes through critical synthesis, conceptual framework-building, balance, submission, and revision.

plugins.name: psychbull-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Psychological Bulletin review / meta-analysis lifecycle — from a meta-analyzable question through PRISMA search, coding, random-effects synthesis, moderators and publication-bias diagnostics, MARS/JARS reporting, transparency, submission, and rebuttal.

plugins.name: psychological-review-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill theory-development bundle for Psychological Review, the APA's new-theory/formal-model flagship. Theory-problem framing, formal/conceptual model construction, prediction derivation against rival models and existing data, scope and boundary conditions, model diagrams and simulation-of-model-behavior exhibits, APA style, contribution differentiation, and masked review via Editorial Manager. NO primary empirical reports — that is the lane of the JEP family / Psychological Science.

plugins.name: psci-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Psychological Science manuscript lifecycle, including its short-report word format and post-2024 open-science requirements.

plugins.name: public-administration-review-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Public Administration Review (PAR) manuscript lifecycle across public-administration subfields, the journal's five article types, and its research-and-practice Evidence for Practice requirement.

plugins.name: poq-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Public Opinion Quarterly (POQ) manuscript lifecycle with a survey-methodology spine — Total Survey Error, questionnaire design, sampling and weighting, mode effects, nonresponse — and AAPOR-standard methodological disclosure.

plugins.name: qe-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Quantitative Economics (QE) manuscript lifecycle, from topic selection through the Econometric Society Data Editor reproducibility check and R&R rebuttal.

plugins.name: qje-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Quarterly Journal of Economics (QJE) manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: rje-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering The RAND Journal of Economics (RJE) manuscript lifecycle for industrial-organization research.

plugins.name: research-policy-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Research Policy manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: review-of-accounting-studies-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Review of Accounting Studies manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: red-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Review of Economic Dynamics (RED) manuscript lifecycle for quantitative/dynamic economics.

plugins.name: restud-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the The Review of Economic Studies (REStud) manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: restat-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the The Review of Economics and Statistics (REStat) manuscript lifecycle, from topic selection through the Harvard Dataverse replication package and R&R rebuttal.

plugins.name: review-of-educational-research-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Review of Educational Research (RER) review-article lifecycle, from scoping a synthesis-worthy question and a preregistered protocol through systematic search, the organizing framework, comprehensiveness and risk-of-bias, PRISMA/MARS transparency, submission, and revision.

plugins.name: rof-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Review of Finance (RoF) manuscript lifecycle for empirical and theoretical finance.

plugins.name: rfs-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the The Review of Financial Studies (RFS) manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: science-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Science manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, scope/significance fit, advance framing, abstract + one-sentence summary, main-text writing, display items, statistics & reproducibility, data/materials/code availability, reference style, cover letter, submission preflight, and reviewer rebuttal.

plugins.name: sf-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Social Forces manuscript lifecycle across the generalist sociological and social-science subfields the journal serves, under its strict reference-inclusive 10,000-word cap and Chicago author-date style.

plugins.name: spq-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Social Psychology Quarterly (SPQ) manuscript lifecycle across sociological social psychology — self and identity, social structure and personality, group processes, symbolic interaction, status, and affect.

plugins.name: social-sciences-in-china-skills
plugins.description: Eleven-skill bundle covering the 《中国社会科学》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, fit positioning, problematic framing, original-theory contribution, theory-tradition literature dialogue, argumentation rigor, evidence handling, scholarly style, abstract + keywords, submission preflight, and rebuttal.

plugins.name: sociological-methods-and-research-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Sociological Methods & Research (SMR) manuscript lifecycle — method-contribution fit, derivation and analytical properties, Monte Carlo simulation studies, a real-data empirical illustration, released reproducible software, ScholarOne submission, and rebuttal.

plugins.name: sociological-studies-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the 《社会学研究》 manuscript lifecycle for both quantitative and qualitative sociology: workflow router, fit positioning, sociological problematic, theory dialogue, quantitative craft (CGSS/CFPS/CLDS), qualitative craft (ethnography/interview/grounded theory), social-process mechanism, concept building, scholarly style, abstract + keywords, submission preflight, and rebuttal.

plugins.name: sociological-theory-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Sociological Theory (ST) manuscript lifecycle. Theoretical-problem framing, tradition positioning, concept and proposition construction, argument validity in place of statistical robustness, boundary conditions, conceptual exhibits (typologies and mechanism diagrams, never data plots), contribution framing, ASA style, and the double-anonymous Manuscript Central review. NO empirical hypothesis-testing — that is ASR / AJS's lane.

plugins.name: smj-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Strategic Management Journal (SMJ) manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: tar-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering The Accounting Review (TAR) manuscript lifecycle for archival/empirical and analytical accounting research.

plugins.name: artbull-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering The Art Bulletin manuscript lifecycle, built around the image-and-permissions and visual-analysis demands that distinguish art-historical publishing.

plugins.name: ectj-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering The Econometrics Journal (EctJ) manuscript lifecycle — leading-case fit, asymptotics, Monte Carlo, required empirical application, the ~20-page LaTeX-template format, and the conditional-on-acceptance replication package.

plugins.name: economic-journal-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the The Economic Journal (EJ) manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: wber-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the The World Bank Economic Review manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: world-development-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the World Development manuscript lifecycle.

plugins.name: wp-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the World Politics manuscript lifecycle for comparative-politics and international-relations research, including the journal's research-article and review-article tracks.

plugins.name: yale-law-journal-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the The Yale Law Journal (YLJ) manuscript lifecycle for Articles, Essays, Features, student Notes & Comments, and the online YLJ Forum.

plugins.name: research-toolkit-skills
plugins.description: Cross-journal author workflow toolkit (7 skills): venue selection (journal-match), the StatsPAI / Stata MCP execution bridge, submission-readiness self-check, simulated referee, response-to-referees, and replication-package assembly. Complements the per-journal depth packs.
